subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath guided His servants unto His straight Path, Who hath apprised them of His momentous Message and given them glad tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدی عباده الی صراطه المستقیم و اخبرهم بنباه العظیم و بشرهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
